tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Had.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Had का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have a car. I had a car. He has money. He had money. They have a house.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) about your day using Had.
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपने दिन के बारे में Had का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They had a house. The company has 100 employees. The company had 100 employees. I had a motorcycle. She had a laptop.

tasks.prompt: Translate the following into English: "हमारे पास एक बड़ा घर था।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "He had money yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue between two people using Had.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Had का उपयोग करते हुए दो व्यक्तियों के बीच 4 पंक्तियों का संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He had a good boss. I had an old book. The company had a large team. The child had many toys.
